why_it_matters: BMI in the overweight range is a modifiable cardiovascular risk factor directly relevant to initiating hypertension treatment and lifestyle counseling.
Heart rate and respiratory rate complete the vital sign set and provide baseline context, but these normal values do not change management at this visit.
The PRAPARE findings substantiate the documented housing/social stressors and justify the tenant-rights and housing-hotline interventions central to this visit.
Documenting that a health and social care needs assessment was completed supports care-coordination and billing completeness but does not alter clinical decisions.
